2:54 - SHIP HAPPENS 
Pencilmate wants to ship a package to Pencilmiss. Will it get there? 

6:34 - WHAT A CALL 
Pencilmate's waiting for a text back! How can Pencilmiss text so SLOW?!

9:34 - FRY SO SERIOUS?
Have we also mentioned that these burgeres are locally sourced, and completely greenhouse gas friendly? Pencilmate's the ULTIMATE FRY Cook!

12:51 - PRIMP MY RIDE 
Pencilmiss overslept her date! Will she get ready on time?!

15:18 - FAILURE TO LUNCH
Pencilmate has the longest sandwich ever! 

17:36 - BE FAIRY FAIRY QUIET
Mini Mate loses a tooth! With he finally get to meet the toothfairy? 

21:06 - TAG REFLEX
Pencilmate and Mini Mate play tag but... Mini Mate GOES MISSING?!

24:59 - IN PLANE SIGHT 
Pencilmate tries to fly a toy plane! How far will he get?

28:05 - REMOTE CONTROLLED
Pencilmate finds the best remote! Until Mini Mate gets his hands on it.

Is Pencilmate Smarter than a BABY? -in- "You Thumb Drive Me Crazy"| Pencilmation

ABOUT PENCILMATION :
Pencilmation is a cartoon channel for everyone, especially not-too-serious grown-ups. It is made with love and a lot of fun by an international team helmed by Ross Bollinger who started the channel alone in his room a long time ago. Follow the new, wacky, and often times quite silly adventures of Pencilmate, Little Blue Man, Pencilmiss and other toons every Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday and Sunday.

snippet.title: Martina Cabut Nyawa Sultan
snippet.description:
Martina mendapat tugas dari malaikat untuk cabut nyawa sultan sombong yang dosanya full damage. Malaikat pencatat dosa menyamar jadi gembel untuk meminta sedekah dari sultan tapi sultan tidak mau ngasih. Martina langsung cabut nyawa sultan dan sultan bingung karena hartanya tidak dibawa. Sultan di bawa ke neraka sama iblis.

Character inspired by @Vernalta 

Makasih buat kak Vernando Altamirano untuk disain karakternya, aku sudah hubungi kak Vernalta lewat DM buat izin. Kata kak Vernalta udah liat dan dibolehin untuk memakai karakternya asal dicantumkan sumbernya. Makasih kak Nando baik banget ^^ semoga makin sukses yaa....

snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. It‚Äôs both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. It‚Äôs a vicious cycle.

ŔÄŔÄŔÄŔÄŔÄ

snippet.title: (OST Rindu Awak Separuh Nyawa) Lia Aziz - Kucu Kuca [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Lia Aziz merupakan seorang penyanyi baru yang mempertaruhkan lagu berbentuk pop yang bertajuk 'Kucu Kuca', single pertama beliau hasil ciptaan Ejai Azarra dan Afiez Azam.

Kucu Kuca
Lia Aziz
Lagu : Ejai Aziz
Lirik : Ejai Aziz
Publisher: MVM Production Sdn Bhd
Music Producer & Arranger : Afiez Azam
Vocal Producer : Ernie Zakri, Afiez Azam
Studio: Rusa Studio
Mixing: Vincent Chan
Mastering: CL Toh (Mastering One Studio)

Kucu Kuca (Verse)
Maxis CRT : Dail *131*683098# and press CALL
Digi Caller Tunes : Dail *233*1530711# and press CALL
Celcom CMT :Dail *323*765838# and press CALL

Kucu Kuca (Chorus)
Maxis CRT : Dail *131*683099# and press CALL
Digi Caller Tunes : Dail *233*1530712# and press CALL
Celcom CMT :Dail *323*765839# and press CALL

Link to streaming: https://UMD.lnk.to/KucuKuca

Official IG:
@liaaa.aziz
https://www.instagram.com/liaaa.aziz/

Music Video Production
Executive Producer : Brattbob
Director/DOP/Editor/Post Production : Akmal Hakeem Harris
Art by  NotJustDessert
Art Director : Hannah Shafiqah
Art Team :  Amir Johari, Amina Shahirah, Fauzan Hak, Hazirah Rahman, Resha
Production Assistant: Darrien Danker, Jon THC, Amirul Rizuan, Nas Amirul
Make Up: Siew Keng & Yikki Yip
Sponsor: Sophea Rose, Geb.
Still Photography : Azim Sharif

Lirik 'Kucu Kuca' Lia Aziz:

Kelip bintang nun jauh dia sana
Sudah pastinya ku fikirkan dirimu
Deru angin bertiupan berlagu
Inginku sampai rinduan di hati

Lagu cinta ini untuk kamu
Sambilku tenung bulan menghiasi malam
Dan tercipta bibit kata indah
Dan lagukan rasaku

Kucu kuca kucu kuca
Serentak dengan nadaku
Bersama jari jemariku
Menyeru menari bersama diriku...

Namamu ku rahsiakan
Dan telah terpatri di hatiku
Kucu kuca kucu kuca
Opss alamak
Aku jatuh cinta

#KucuKuca #LiaAziz

snippet.title: The Duke of Edinburgh's Coffin Arrives at St George's Chapel
snippet.description:
Prince Philip's coffin has arrived at St George's Chapel in Windsor ahead of his funeral ceremony.

It was followed by members of the Royal Family in a procession from Windsor Castle to the Chapel.

#PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily #Funeral

snippet.title: ANANG & ASHANTY - CINTA TANPA SYARAT (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Sukses dengan album duet ‚ÄúJodohku‚ÄĚ pada tahun 2011, single ‚ÄúLuar Biasa‚ÄĚ pada tahun 2019. Pada tahun 2021 ini Anang Hermansyah dan Ashanty kembali mengeluarkan single ‚ÄúCinta Tanpa Syarat‚ÄĚ. Hal ini tentunya merupakan persembahan istimewa untuk para penggemar dan penikmat musik
 
‚ÄúCinta Tanpa Syarat‚ÄĚ adalah sebuah persembahan dari Anang Hermansyah dan Ashanty untuk pernikahan Aurelie Hermansyah dan Atta Halilintar. Lirik lagu ini ditulis oleh Ashanty, dan musik dalam lagu ini muncul dari ide Anang Hermansyah. Lagu ini tentang cinta kasih kedua orang tua untuk melepas anaknya yang akan menikah.

Musik Credit:
Produser : Ashanty
Artist ‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč: Anang Hermansyah & Ashanty
Judul Lagu‚Äč‚Äč: Cinta Tanpa Syarat
Composer‚Äč‚Äč: Anang Hermansyah & Ashanty

Vocal Director‚Äč  : Lucky Tampilang 
                           : Metha Zulia
Mixing & Mastering‚Äč: Wawaz Akasah
Produksi‚Äč‚Äč: Hijau Music

snippet.title: Kaka Azraff, Noki, Loca B - Gila | #AJL35
snippet.description:
Anugerah Juara Lagu 35 akan berlangsung pada jam 9 malam ini dalam norma baharu selepas ditunda lebih sebulan demi mematuhi Perintah Kawalan Pergerakan (PKP) yang diumumkan Perdana Menteri, Tan Sri Muhyiddin Yassin pada Januari lalu. Sherry Alhadad, Awal Ashaari dan Haziq Hussni menggalas tugas selaku pengacara. Saksikan siaran langsung AJL35 di TV3 atau strim di saluran YouTube TV3Malaysia.

1. Hutang - Floor 88
Komposer: Zai Hamzah
Lirik: Achoi Floor 88

2. Peluang Kedua - Nabila Razali
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & MFMF

3. Belenggu Rindu - Wany Hasrita & Dato‚Äô Jamal Abdillah
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & Ezra Kong

4. Aku Bidadari Syurgamu - Aishah
Komposer: Ippo Hafiz
Lirik: Siti Rosmizah

5. Hati - Hael Husaini
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & Ezra Kong

6. 7 Nasihat - Shiha Zikir, Kmy Kmo & Luca Sickta
Komposer & Lirik: Kmy Kmo & Luca Sickta

7. Semalam - Aina Abdul
Komposer & Lirik: Aina Abdul

8. Gundah - Ernie Zakri
Komposer & Lirik: Ernie Zakri & Sharon Paul

9. Jangan Khianati Aku - Azlan & The Typewriter
Komposer & Lirik: Dark

10. Kau Sakiti - Amir Masdi
Komposer & Lirik: Faizal Tahir, Mike Chan, Ezra Kong, Romeo & Mage

11. Gila - Kaka Azraff, Noki & Loca B
Komposer & Lirik: Noki, Loca B & Ezra Kong

12. EH - Zizi Kirana
Komposer: Navigator & Zizi Kirana
Lirik: Mambang & Zizi Kirana

#AJL35‚Äč
